events.event_description: Eugene Schuyler presented credentials as Diplomatic Agent/Consul General, establishing a liaison-level U.S. presence in Romania.

evidence.quote: Eugene Schuyler, Diplomatic Agent/Consul General. Appointed: 1880-06-11. Credentials presented: 1880-12-14.

events.event_description: Eugene Schuyler promoted to Chargé d'Affaires and Consul General, elevating the U.S. presence to a legation-level mission.

evidence.quote: Eugene Schuyler, Chargé d'Affaires and Consul General. Appointed: 1880-12-21. Credentials presented: 1881-01-25.

events.event_description: Romania declared war on the United States, ending U.S. diplomatic representation.

evidence.quote: Romania declared war on the United States on 1941-12-12. Note: Gunther died at Bucharest on December 22, 1941.

events.event_description: Rudolf Emil Schoenfeld presented credentials as Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary, re-establishing the U.S. Legation in Romania after WWII.

evidence.quote: Rudolf Emil Schoenfeld, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1947-07-28. Credentials presented: 1947-09-25.

events.event_description: The U.S. Legation in Bucharest was formally raised to Embassy status.

evidence.quote: John P. Shaw was serving as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim when the Legation in Bucharest was raised to Embassy status on June 1, 1964.
